description: op-to-op latency CI golden (Blackhole, bh_p150_perf). Runs under TT_METAL_PROFILER_ACCUMULATE=1 so the per-program L1->DRAM profiler dump does not land in the op2op gap (reviewer request: otherwise the gap is inflated by profiler writeout). RECORD MODE (null): the kernels were migrated to the Device 2.0 data-movement API (Noc/CircularBuffer), which reproducibly ~halves op2op vs the legacy free-function path, so the prior goldens are stale. Re-collecting fresh CI baselines under the new API before re-arming (8 local bh runs under the new API centered official_op2op_us~1.10, pack_to_unpack_op2op_us~2.26; re-arm from CI bh_p150_perf). Prior legacy-API armed values were official_op2op_us=2.10, pack_to_unpack_op2op_us=4.60 (tolerance_pct=10).
